name: Cool Lime Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil. Remove from heat.
2. Add 1 box of Jell-O, stirring until it dissolves. Pour into a medium-sized casserole dish and chill until firm.
3. In another small saucepan, bring the remaining 1/2 cup of water to a boil. Remove from heat.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the remaining Jell-O and water. Stir until the Jell-O dissolves. Cool slightly.
5. Fold in the Cool Whip until smooth. Spoon the fruit cocktail evenly over the chilled Jell-O layer.
6. Spread the Cool Whip mixture evenly over the fruit cocktail.
7. Sprinkle with graham cracker crumbs.
8. Chill until firm.
Note: To speed the setting process, place the first Jell-O layer in the freezer for about 30 minutes before proceeding as directed.
